violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the dish-washing area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
2 door retail refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (peeling off). New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -storage cabinets, -retail shelves, -retail cooler shelves, -1 door retail freezer, -walk-in cooler fan blades. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Inspector observed hand-washing sink near the 3 bay sink was lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The floors throughout the facility (including under retail shelves, under equipment, and walk-in coolers) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The coving in the food prep area is in poor repair (hanging off wall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Cups and rags observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Various beverage containers observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the frozen beverage station and retail shelves have an accumulation of food residue, lids, dust, dirt and liquid spillage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The floors in the retail and back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
